Using power indiscriminately can lead to moral compromises within oneself. Accountability systems fail to track these unique and dangerous actions. Ethical dilemmas persist whenever the cost of survival outweighs the law.

Ultimately, the balance between benefit and danger remains precarious always. One must choose carefully how to wield this unprecedented potential.<|im_end|>
